title: Prawn Paella
description: A classic Spanish dish made with succulent prawns and savory spices. Perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the prawns and cook for 2-3 minutes until pink and lightly browned.
Add the sweet paprika and Mexican chili powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the paella rice and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
